mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_behavior WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType}
SELECT behavior_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY behavior_type
